artifacts.summary: Implementation summary covering all 5 phases: new extension and OpenCode docs, updated agent system pages, install wizard agent-systems group, README rewrite, and .opencode/docs/ cleanup.

completion_data.completion_summary: Rewrote all user-facing documentation (README.md, docs/, install wizard) to present Claude Code and OpenCode as equal peer agent systems. Created extensions.md feature matrix and opencode.md reference page, added agent-systems install group, fixed broken links, cleaned ghost extension references from .opencode/docs/.

memory_candidates.content: When referencing .opencode/README.md in documentation links, the actual navigation hub file is at .opencode/docs/README.md (not .opencode/README.md which does not exist). Similarly, .claude/README.md does not exist; the hub is at .claude/docs/README.md. The always-loaded quick references are .claude/CLAUDE.md and .opencode/AGENTS.md respectively.
